title: StarSource
body:
More cool drawn swords
Some introduction
Star Wish: A method for obtaining star-derived ingots; Hold this item to cancel the player's death and consume this item to receive a Starsource Ingot
Starborne ingots: Materials for making Starborne drawn swords
Added drawn swords (introduced by strength, from weak to strong)
Star Draw Sword: The most basic draw sword, SA Star draw の force, quickly release 10 phantom flying blades (overlapping to look like one) at the place the player aims.
Star Shadow Draw Sword :SA Shadow Power, release the triangular shape of the Phantom sword
Super Star Shadow Sword :SA Shadow God Power, player-centered range 30*30*30 generates 50+ Phantom swords, each phantom sword damage is 8(not always able to hit creatures)
Starfire Draws Sword :SA Starfire Legend generates a blue orb with a radius of 5 that deals 6 damage per second to creatures for 10 seconds
Star drawn sword :SA gas cut, similar to the Yuan blade, but the number of phantom flying blades is more than the Yuan blade, and two more layers
Starburst Cut Sword :SA meteor cut, fast cross cut 10+ times, total damage of about 250(need to hit all)
Final fire pull sword :SA final star field, generate a radius of 0.5 square size of the blue sphere, gradually larger over time, lasting 15 seconds, sucking the surrounding creatures to the center of the sphere, caused every second
10 damage
Star God Dragon draw sword: the strongest draw sword, SA dragon God's wrath, long press the right button at the same time around the shadow of the dragon, fast cross cut 20 times when released, with the player as the center of the park to release 2 circles of 36 magic
Shadow Flying Blades, with the player as the center of the range 10 randomly generated 150 phantom flying blades (will not get stuck) on the player's head (head of 5 square blocks) to generate a transparent sphere, lasting 1 second, quickly suck around
Creature reaches the center of the ball and deals 100 damage
一些介绍
星之祈愿:获得星源之锭的方法;手持此物品在玩家死亡时取消死亡并且消耗此物品获得一个星源之锭
星源之锭:制作星源拔刀剑的材料
添加的拔刀剑(按强度介绍，从弱到强)
星源拔刀剑:最基础的拔刀剑，SA星源の力，对着玩家瞄准的地方快速释放10个幻影飞刃(重叠起来的，看起来跟一个一样)
星影拔刀剑:SA影之力，释放三角形状的幻影剑
超级星影剑:SA影神之力，以玩家为中心范围30*30*30生成50+的幻影剑，每个幻影剑伤害为8(不一定都能打到生物)
星火拔刀剑:SA星火传说，生成一个半径为5的蓝色球体，每秒对生物造成6点伤害，持续10秒
星辉拔刀剑:SA气斩，跟元刃类似，不过幻影飞刃数量比元刃多，并且多两层
星爆斩拔刀剑:SA流星斩，快速十字斩10+次，总共伤害约为250(需要都命中)
终火拔刀剑:SA终星之域，生成一个半径0.5个方块大小的蓝色球体，随着时间逐渐变大，持续15秒，吸起周围生物到球体中心，每秒造成
10点伤害
星神龙拔刀剑:最强的拔刀剑，SA龙神之怒，长按右键的同时周围有龙的虚影，释放时快速十字斩20次，以玩家为园心一國释放2圈36个幻
影飞刃，以玩家为中心范围10随机生成150个幻影飞刃(不会卡)在玩家头顶(头顶5格方块)生成一个透明球体，持续1秒，快速吸起周围
生物到球中心，并造成100点伤害
